title: selaginella australiensis var. leptostachya
intro: Selaginella australiensis var. leptostachya, also known as the Queensland spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Australian and Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella australiensis var. leptostachya include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
